ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

Apache Doris is an easy-to-use, high performance and unified analytics database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bethington/ghidra-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bethington/ghidra-mcp
Language: java
Ghidra MCP Server — 200+ MCP tools for AI-powered reverse engineering. GUI plugin + headless server, lazy tool loading, convention enforcement, batch operations, Ghidra Server integration, and Docker deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/copilot-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk
Language: java
Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: j-shelfwood/voxy-neoforge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/j-shelfwood/voxy-neoforge
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jenkinsci/jenkins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jenkinsci/jenkins
Language: java
Jenkins automation server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j
Language: java
LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j-examples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j-examples
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nageoffer/ragent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nageoffer/ragent
Language: java
企业级 Agentic RAG 智能体 - 全链路覆盖文档解析、多路检索、意图识别、问题重写、会话记忆、MCP 工具调用与深度思考。面向真实业务场景，从 0 到 1 完整工程实现。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf
Language: java
PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.
